user.title: EVN ePoint login
user.description: Enter the phone number and password of your EVN ePoint app account. An OTP will be sent via SMS.

otp.title: Enter OTP
otp.description: Enter the OTP code just sent via SMS to your phone.

error.otp_send_failed: Could not send OTP, please try again.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the EVN ePoint server.
